metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for 999online developers.

plugins.name: web-scaffold
plugins.description: Agentic web project scaffolding on incubation architecture standards — discover idea, pick lightest credible golden path (landing / full-stack / internal tool / API service), approve ADR, build via official scaffolders, verify against decision standard. Strict structure contract enforced in generated projects.

plugins.name: mobile-scaffold
plugins.description: Agentic mobile app scaffolding on incubation architecture standards (Path F) — discover idea, pick distribution mode (PWA / native / both) and lightest credible Expo stack, approve ADR, build via create-expo-app, verify against decision standard. Strict structure contract enforced in generated projects.
